title: En la pulpería
desc: The corner store and daily ritual

sn.s: Cerca de mi casa hay una pulpería.
sn.e: Near my house there's a corner store.
"Good. I want bread and two eggs."

sn.s: Doña Marta conoce a todos los vecinos.
sn.e: Doña Marta knows all the neighbors.

sn.s: Un señor llega. "Doña Marta, ¿me fía hasta el viernes?"
sn.e: "Doña Marta, can you let me pay on Friday?"

sn.s: Aquí la gente compra fiado y paga después.
sn.e: Here people buy on credit and pay later.

sn.s: "Aquí tenés tu pan," me dice doña Marta.
sn.e: "Here's your bread," doña Marta tells me.

sn.s: La pulpería no es solo una tienda.
sn.e: The corner store isn't just a shop.
It's the heart of the neighborhood.
